root.name: Replace Background Image on Slide 2
root.description: Evaluates whether the background image of slide 2 was successfully replaced with a lighter one, without making unintended changes to other aspects of the presentation

children.name: Background Image Changed on Slide 2
children.description: Verifies that the background image on slide 2 has been modified from the original

children.name: New Background is Lighter
children.description: Verifies that the new background image is lighter than the original background image

children.name: No Unintended Changes
children.description: Ensures that no unintended changes were made to other slides or elements

children.name: Other Slides Unchanged
children.description: Verifies that slides other than slide 2 remain unchanged

children.name: Slide 2 Content Preserved
children.description: Verifies that text content and other elements on slide 2 remain unchanged (only background should change)

children.name: No Animation or Transition Changes
children.description: Verifies that no animations or transitions were unintentionally modified

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Check for any animation changes
    total_animation_changes = (len(ppt_diff.added_animations) + 
                             len(ppt_diff.removed_animations) + 
                             len(ppt_diff.modified_animations))
    
    # Check for any transition changes
    total_transition_changes = (len(ppt_diff.added_transitions) + 
                              len(ppt_diff.removed_transitions) + 
                              len(ppt_diff.modified_transitions))
    
    if total_animation_changes > 0:
        return f"Unintended animation changes detected: {total_animation_changes} changes", 0.0
    
    if total_transition_changes > 0:
        return f"Unintended transition changes detected: {total_transition_changes} changes", 0.0
    
    return "No unintended animation or transition changes", 1.0

metadata.task: Replace the background image of the slide 2 to with a lighter one
